title: Karnataka-Kerala connection: P.C. Vishnunadh’s induction into V.D. Satheesan cabinet brings cheer to people of Tumari in Sagar
description: P.C. Vishnunadh, who took oath as a Minister in the newly sworn-in Kerala government, is married to Ha.Ma. Kanaka, a Kannada poet and native of Haalkere village in Tumari Gram Panchayat
